creator: ari@ish.com.au
text:
bsdlabel -e does not work on live CD since it cannot find the correct path
to vi. It looks for /rescue/vi which doesn't exist, but /mnt2/rescue/vi
does exist.

Fix: 

Change to the environment path?
How-To-Repeat: 1. Boot from installer CD.
2. Drop into 'live CD' shell
3. type "bsdlabel -e" on the command line
